data.title: Hick's Law
data.description: Simplified user interface to minimize choice overload and improve decision-making speed.
data.technical_spec: UI design prioritizes essential features, employs minimalistic design principles.

data.title: Fitts’s Law
data.description: Optimized UI elements designed for efficient navigation and interaction.
data.technical_spec: Strategically placed call-to-action buttons to shorten user interaction paths.

data.title: Millers’s Law
data.description: Information architecture aligns with cognitive load management principles.
data.technical_spec: Organizes information into chunks, uses familiar patterns and labels.

data.title: Gestalt Principles
data.description: Design leverages Gestalt principles to create visually cohesive and intuitive layouts.
data.technical_spec: Use of proximity, similarity, and continuity to guide visual hierarchy.

data.title: Jakob’s Law
data.description: Interface consistency with common web and app navigation patterns.
data.technical_spec: Adopted navigation structures and elements users are accustomed to from similar platforms.
